data.name: CaRoSaC: 시뮬레이션을 통한 케이블 사그 문제를 고려한 케이블 구동 병렬 로봇의 강화학습 기반 운동학 제어

data.description: CaRoSaC: A Reinforcement Learning-Based Kinematic Control of Cable-Driven Parallel Robots by Addressing Cable Sag through Simulation discusses Sim-to-Real Transfer.
CaRoSaC: A Reinforcement Learning-Based Kinematic Control of Cable-Driven Parallel Robots by Addressing Cable Sag through Simulation uses Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO).
CaRoSaC: A Reinforcement Learning-Based Kinematic Control of Cable-Driven Parallel Robots by Addressing Cable Sag through Simulation uses Domain Randomization.
